opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel sick to my stomach constantly, I can't sleep, and I honestly don't care about anything anymore.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The nausea and the ache in my belly have been going non-stop for about two days now and the antacids aren't touching it. My spouse made me get checked because I'm just wiped out and not myself.

symptom_narrative.onset: the stomach upset and the belly ache came on over the last couple of days; the exhaustion and feeling flat have been building for a long time
symptom_narrative.duration: about 48 hours for the nausea and belly pain; the tiredness has been going on for months
symptom_narrative.character: a constant queasy sick feeling with a vague crampy ache low in my belly, plus a tight band headache; and I just feel drained and switched off
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the nausea is really wearing me down and I can't face food; I feel completely spent
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my belly, not one spot; the headache is like a tight band around my head
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the nausea and ache are there most of the time and don't really let up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — I tried antacids and they didn't help
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: tension headaches, no appetite, can't sleep, feeling irritable and short with people, and just numb and hopeless about things
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt run down and flat for a long time but the stomach thing is new over the last couple of days
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't get my work done and I can't keep up at home — the tiredness and the sick feeling stop me doing anything

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: works in community advocacy and has felt completely drained and exhausted by the work lately; feels guilty about needing any time off; spouse is present and worried.

objective_data_offered.value: looks worn out and drained, restless, not making much eye contact and seems emotionally flat
spouse says the patient has been very irritable and short with people, asked to turn off the news radio, and makes dark jokes about awful events
